textByHash.16ac4570824c93547d4ac569468a1b7fda957061: Right here is where you'll find them. What business do you have with the Saviours?
textByHash.b050c4cdf7e39841c9eb90cffb97d6efcbd25f55: Join the gang? Do you think this is a game?
textByHash.5f37e222f8f313598c6293e8528482f1e7382f47: We don't just let anyone join our gang. If you want in, you'll need to prove your worth.
textByHash.ea24c2f2ef98469830e4b4e4401a09d6942a7ddc: Since our formation, many of the other gangs in Kourend have joined our cause. However, some still choose to resist.
textByHash.6b273a99f98fc5979e491024035f02c852040269: Our largest rivals are the Vipers and our leader...
textByHash.a320a9dea5951d70ddbc5165381abf97ee9b8e29: Our leader has had enough of the Vipers and wants to make an example of them.
textByHash.8a988350762be7613f06bd1fa19a7fcc943ea3c2: We need to send a message to the Vipers to let them know that their days are done.
textByHash.6ad433604a101ed89bfa197cac0a38babdc66f64: We'd like you to kill Conrad King, one of their senior members. The man has been a thorn in our side for far too long. Besides, his murderous ways make us look like paragons of virtue in comparison.
textByHash.fc648eb8d98ea10147027bafcf6c856b1651111f: Is this going to be a problem?
textByHash.9397dafe226d2e51b292b7a4d6081f1ce9d6d1ed: Good. You'll find Conrad King south of the Piscarilius Foodhall. News travels fast around here so we'll know when the deed is done.
textByHash.7633cac6c9f8944dd23a7a13f4f62fe04a2e9bed: Well then we have nothing to discuss. If you change your mind, you'll find Conrad King south of the Piscarilius Foodhall. News travels fast around here so we'll know when the deed is done.
textByHash.166369aa4e95533d9909622118d62668a3123bb8: Conrad King is still alive so I don't know what you're doing here. Go get the job done. He can be found south of the Piscarilius Foodhall.
textByHash.9013d6258e017be28bdcbfae7fa7329b9127d85c: Word on the streets is that Conrad King has met his maker. The queen is impressed. You should head on in and speak to her.
textByHash.8bc88a4fadc1698f1a45559e8efc7ebec04ed9d0: Yes! Now get out of my sight!
